PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
SELECT ?teamLabel ?playerLabel ?positionLabel ?points WHERE {
  wd:Q100701217 wdt:P1923 ?team .
  ?team rdfs:label ?teamLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?teamLabel) = 'en')
  .
  ?player p:P54 / ps:P54 ?team .
  ?player p:P1534 / ps:P1534 ?points .
  ?player p:P1534 / pq:P2034 wd:Q100701217 .
  ?player wdt:P413 ?position .
  ?player rdfs:label ?playerLabel .
  ?position rdfs:label ?positionLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?playerLabel) = 'en')
  .
  FILTER(LANG(?positionLabel) = 'en')
  .
  {
    SELECT ?team(MAX(?points) AS ?maxPoints) WHERE {
      wd:Q100701217 wdt:P1923 ?team .
      ?player p:P54 / ps:P54 ?team .
      ?player p:P1534 / ps:P1534 ?points .
      ?player p:P1534 / pq:P2034 wd:Q100701217 .
    }
    GROUP BY ?team
  }
  FILTER(?points = ?maxPoints)
}
ORDER BY ?teamLabel
